worldcup.label: FIFA World Cup
worldcup.notes: Soccer-specific model inputs: xG, PPDA, ELO/FIFA rank, rest, injuries, suspensions, lineups, weather, and tournament context.

nba.label: NBA
nba.notes: Future NBA inputs: minutes, usage, pace, last 10 games, opponent defensive profile, injuries, rest, rebound chances, assist potential, and player props.

nfl.label: NFL
nfl.notes: Future NFL inputs: EPA, DVOA, QB pressure, weather, injuries, pace, pass rate over expectation, red-zone efficiency, and matchup tendencies.

mlb.label: MLB
mlb.notes: Future MLB inputs: starting pitchers, bullpen usage, handedness splits, park factors, weather/wind, wRC+, strikeout/walk rates, and lineup quality.
